items.title: OpenAI says 97.9% of its employees are now using Codex, up from ~40% in August 2025; non-developer usage of Codex has risen 137x for individual users (Thomas Claburn/The Register)
items.title_original: OpenAI says 97.9% of its employees are now using Codex, up from ~40% in August 2025; non-developer usage of Codex has risen 137x for individual users (Thomas Claburn/The Register)
items.title_en: OpenAI says 97.9% of its employees are now using Codex, up from ~40% in August 2025; non-developer usage of Codex has risen 137x for individual users (Thomas Claburn/The Register)
items.title_zh: OpenAI 表示，目前 97.9% 的員工正在使用 Codex，高於 2025 年 8 月的約 40%；對於個人用戶而言，非開發人員對 Codex 的使用量增加了 137 倍（Thomas Claburn/The Register）
items.title_bilingual: OpenAI 表示，目前 97.9% 的員工正在使用 Codex，高於 2025 年 8 月的約 40%；對於個人用戶而言，非開發人員對 Codex 的使用量增加了 137 倍（Thomas Claburn/The Register） / OpenAI says 97.9% of its employees are now using Codex, up from ~40% in August 2025; non-developer usage of Codex has risen 137x for individual users (Thomas Claburn/The Register)

items.title: Warp, a startup using AI to automate payroll compliance and employee management, raised a $60M Series B led by Battery, bringing its total funding to $85M (Lucinda Shen/Axios)
items.title_original: Warp, a startup using AI to automate payroll compliance and employee management, raised a $60M Series B led by Battery, bringing its total funding to $85M (Lucinda Shen/Axios)
items.title_en: Warp, a startup using AI to automate payroll compliance and employee management, raised a $60M Series B led by Battery, bringing its total funding to $85M (Lucinda Shen/Axios)
items.title_zh: Warp 是一家利用人工智慧實現薪資合規和員工管理自動化的新創公司，籌集了由 Battery 領投的 6,000 萬美元 B 輪融資，使其總資金達到 8,500 萬美元（Lucinda Shen/Axios）
items.title_bilingual: Warp 是一家利用人工智慧實現薪資合規和員工管理自動化的新創公司，籌集了由 Battery 領投的 6,000 萬美元 B 輪融資，使其總資金達到 8,500 萬美元（Lucinda Shen/Axios） / Warp, a startup using AI to automate payroll compliance and employee management, raised a $60M Series B led by Battery, bringing its total funding to $85M (Lucinda Shen/Axios)

items.title: Utah-based ecommerce tech company Redo raised an $81M Series B at a $1.25B valuation led by Smash Capital, with participation from Pelion and Cervin (David Politis/Utah Money Watch)

items.title_zh: 總部位於猶他州的電子商務科技公司 Redo 以 1.25B 美元的估值籌集了 8,100 萬美元的 B 輪融資，由 Smash Capital 領投，Pelion 和 Cervin 參與其中（David Politis/Utah Money Watch）
items.title_bilingual: 總部位於猶他州的電子商務科技公司 Redo 以 1.25B 美元的估值籌集了 8,100 萬美元的 B 輪融資，由 Smash Capital 領投，Pelion 和 Cervin 參與其中（David Politis/Utah Money Watch） / Utah-based ecommerce tech company Redo raised an $81M Series B at a $1.25B valuation led by Smash Capital, with participation from Pelion and Cervin (David Politis/Utah Money Watch)

items.title: SoftBank shares fell 12% after reports that OpenAI may delay its IPO until 2027; expectations of a windfall from OpenAI's debut helped support Softbank's stock (Aya Wagatsuma/Bloomberg)

items.title_en: SoftBank shares fell 12% after reports that OpenAI may delay its IPO until 2027; expectations of a windfall from OpenAI's debut helped support Softbank's stock (Aya Wagatsuma/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 有報導指出 OpenAI 可能將 IPO 推遲至 2027 年，軟銀股價下跌 12%；對 OpenAI 首次亮相帶來的意外收穫的預期支撐了軟銀的股價（Aya Wagatsuma/彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: 有報導指出 OpenAI 可能將 IPO 推遲至 2027 年，軟銀股價下跌 12%；對 OpenAI 首次亮相帶來的意外收穫的預期支撐了軟銀的股價（Aya Wagatsuma/彭博社） / SoftBank shares fell 12% after reports that OpenAI may delay its IPO until 2027; expectations of a windfall from OpenAI's debut helped support Softbank's stock (Aya Wagatsuma/Bloomberg)

items.title_original: Paris-based Tsuga, whose observability software runs in customers' own clouds to help them skip per-byte ingestion costs, raised a $35M Series A led by Singular (Ana Maria Constantin/The Next Web)
items.title_en: Paris-based Tsuga, whose observability software runs in customers' own clouds to help them skip per-byte ingestion costs, raised a $35M Series A led by Singular (Ana Maria Constantin/The Next Web)
items.title_zh: 總部位於巴黎的 Tsuga 的可觀測性軟體在客戶自己的雲端中運行，以幫助他們跳過每個位元組的攝取成本，並籌集了由 Singular 領投的 3500 萬美元 A 輪融資（Ana Maria Constantin/The Next Web）

items.title: NAND flash maker Kioxia, Japan's most valuable company since June 12, plans to offer US depositary shares in spring 2027 amid AI-driven demand for memory chips (Bloomberg)
items.title_original: NAND flash maker Kioxia, Japan's most valuable company since June 12, plans to offer US depositary shares in spring 2027 amid AI-driven demand for memory chips (Bloomberg)
items.title_en: NAND flash maker Kioxia, Japan's most valuable company since June 12, plans to offer US depositary shares in spring 2027 amid AI-driven demand for memory chips (Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: NAND 快閃記憶體製造商 Kioxia 是自 6 月 12 日以來日本市值最高的公司，由於人工智慧驅動的記憶體晶片需求，該公司計劃於 2027 年春季發行美國存託股票（彭博）
items.title_bilingual: NAND 快閃記憶體製造商 Kioxia 是自 6 月 12 日以來日本市值最高的公司，由於人工智慧驅動的記憶體晶片需求，該公司計劃於 2027 年春季發行美國存託股票（彭博） / NAND flash maker Kioxia, Japan's most valuable company since June 12, plans to offer US depositary shares in spring 2027 amid AI-driven demand for memory chips (Bloomberg)
